justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial time preference and the subsequent change, querying the correct date and time ranges each time.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: When the initial request was unavailable, the agent proactively offered to check other times on the same day or a different day, and then provided suitable alternatives when a new date was given.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was efficient, with the agent understanding and processing all requests without unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment without any friction.
